rationale: Coinbase listing-review framework explicitly punishes 'going to the moon' copy. Token-shill language, ROI promises, price predictions, and exclusivity hooks all compound that punishment. The agent runs every draft through this regex before publish; a hit is a hard block, not a warning.
notes: deny_patterns produce a hard block — agent will not publish, governance_a logs the refusal as a marketing.campaign_proposed event with status='REFUSED_VOICE'
soft_warn_patterns produce a warning surfaced in /marketing/campaigns; Convener can override per-campaign via marketinga.toml
The phrase 'not financial advice' is itself banned because its presence in copy is a strong signal that the surrounding copy contains financial advice
Numeric multipliers '10x', '100x' etc. are banned outright. If a 10x improvement is being claimed, write the underlying claim — not the multiplier
